## Final Adversarial Review

Record the `/codex:adversarial-review` that ran immediately before handoff, including scope, findings, resolutions, and the final no-blocking-gaps result. This review is blocking: Claude must wait for it to finish before continuing. If fixes were made after any earlier adversarial review, record the fresh re-review that confirmed no new issues were identified.
